traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: A creature that steps on a pressure plate or opens a sealed door releases the gas in a 10-foot-radius sphere.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 reveals the faint smell or hissing sound. A successful Intelligence (Investigation) check DC 15 reveals the trigger mechanism.

traits.name: Disarm
traits.description: A Dexterity check using thieves' tools DC 15 disables the trigger. A dispel magic (DC 13) on the gas suppresses it for 1 hour.

actions.name: Poison Gas Burst
actions.description: All creatures in a 10-foot-radius sphere must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The gas dissipates after 1 minute but a creature that ends its turn in the area must repeat the save.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: A creature that steps on the covered pit falls in. The pit is 10 feet deep.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 notices the unstable or false flooring.

traits.name: Disable
traits.description: A Dexterity check using thieves' tools DC 15 can jam the cover open or closed.

actions.name: Fall
actions.description: The triggering creature must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it falls 10 feet, taking 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage and landing prone. On a success, it catches the edge and doesn't fall.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: A creature that steps on the covered pit falls in. The pit is 20 feet deep.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 notices the unstable or false flooring.

actions.name: Fall
actions.description: The triggering creature must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it falls 20 feet, taking 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage and landing prone. On a success, it catches the edge and doesn't fall.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: A creature that steps on the covered pit falls in. The pit is 30 feet deep.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 notices the unstable or false flooring.

actions.name: Fall
actions.description: The triggering creature must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it falls 30 feet, taking 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage and landing prone. On a success, it catches the edge and doesn't fall.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: Disturbing a tripwire or a creature stepping on an unstable floor causes rocks to fall from above in a 10-foot-radius area.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 notices the tripwire or loose ceiling stones.

actions.name: Rockfall
actions.description: Each creature in a 10-foot-radius area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't knocked prone.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: A creature stepping on a pressure plate causes spikes to thrust up from the floor in a 5-foot square.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 notices small holes in the floor. A successful Intelligence (Investigation) check DC 15 reveals the pressure plate.

actions.name: Spike Impalement
actions.description: The triggering creature must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, it takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until it receives magical healing or a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Medicine) check. On a success, it takes no damage.

traits.name: Difficult Terrain
traits.description: The area of the acid pool is difficult terrain. A creature that falls prone in the pool or enters it for the first time on a turn takes damage.

traits.name: Corrosive
traits.description: Nonmagical weapons that strike the pool's surface take a permanent -1 penalty to damage rolls after each hit, and are destroyed if the penalty reaches -5.

actions.name: Acid Immersion
actions.description: A creature that enters the acid or starts its turn there takes 7 (2d6) acid damage.

actions.name: Splash
actions.description: If a creature falls into the pool, all creatures within 5 feet of the pool take 3 (1d6) acid damage unless they succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw.

traits.name: Intense Heat
traits.description: A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the lava takes 3 (1d6) fire damage.

traits.name: Slow Flow
traits.description: The lava moves 5 feet per round in a predetermined direction. Any creature in the path must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be pushed 5 feet and knocked prone.

actions.name: Lava Immersion
actions.description: A creature that enters the lava or starts its turn there takes 21 (6d6) fire damage. A creature that dies in the lava is completely destroyed.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: A creature passing between two rune-etched pillars activates the arcane barrier.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Detect Magic spell reveals evocation magic. A successful Intelligence (Arcana) check DC 15 identifies the runes.

traits.name: Disable
traits.description: A dispel magic (DC 14) on either pillar suppresses the barrier for 1 minute. A Dexterity check using thieves' tools DC 15 can scratch out a rune to disable it.

actions.name: Lightning Arc
actions.description: When triggered, arcs of lightning connect the pillars in a 10-foot-wide line up to 20 feet long. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

actions.name: Sustained Barrier
actions.description: While active, any creature that enters or ends its turn within the barrier's area takes 7 (2d6) lightning damage (no save).

traits.name: Dense Webs
traits.description: The entire passage is filled with thick, sticky webbing. The area is heavily obscured and difficult terrain. A creature that enters or starts its turn in the webs must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or become restrained. A restrained creature can use its action to make a DC 13 Strength check to break free.

traits.name: Flammable
traits.description: The webs are highly flammable. Any fire damage dealt to the webs causes them to burn away in a 5-foot-radius area, dealing 3 (1d6) fire damage to any creature inside that area.

actions.name: Web Strand
actions.description: Each round on initiative count 10, a loose strand lashes at one random creature in the passage. The target must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be grappled and pulled 5 feet deeper into the webs.

traits.name: Heat Absorption
traits.description: Brown mold feeds on warmth. Any source of fire or heat brought within 5 feet of the mold causes it to instantly expand 10 feet in all directions. Creatures within the expansion area take 7 (2d6) cold damage as the mold drains heat.

traits.name: Cold Aura
traits.description: A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of brown mold takes 3 (1d6) cold damage.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Survival) check DC 13 identifies the mold. Cold damage destroys a 5-foot patch.

actions.name: Feed on Warmth
actions.description: Any creature that touches the mold or starts its turn in physical contact with it takes 10 (3d6) cold damage and must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion (max 3 levels from this effect).

traits.name: Ambusher
traits.description: Green slime blends with damp stone. A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 is required to spot it before it drops.

traits.name: Acidic Dissolution
traits.description: When the slime contacts flesh, wood, or metal, it deals ongoing acid damage. It can be scraped off (action), frozen, or burned away (any cold, fire, or radiant damage).

actions.name: Drop
actions.description: The green slime drops from the ceiling onto a creature below. The target must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the slime covers it.

actions.name: Corrode
actions.description: A creature covered in green slime takes 5 (1d10) acid damage at the start of each of its turns. Nonmagical armor or weapons in contact with the slime take a permanent -1 penalty and are destroyed after 1 minute.

traits.name: Spore Cloud
traits.description: If disturbed (stepped on, touched, burned, or struck), the mold releases a cloud of poisonous spores in a 10-foot-radius sphere.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Survival) or Intelligence (Nature) check DC 15 identifies the mold. Fire destroys a 5-foot patch.

actions.name: Spore Burst
actions.description: When disturbed, each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. A creature that fails the save by 5 or more is also poisoned for 1 hour.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: A creature stepping on a pressure plate or breaking a tripwire causes a blade to swing from a hidden wall slit.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 reveals the thin slit in the wall. A successful Intelligence (Investigation) DC 15 reveals the trigger.

traits.name: Disable
traits.description: A Dexterity check using thieves' tools DC 15 jams the blade mechanism.

actions.name: Blade Sweep
actions.description: The blade sweeps in a 5-foot line up to 10 feet long. Each creature in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 9 (2d8) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

traits.name: Trigger
traits.description: Disturbing a support beam, strong vibrations, or a trap mechanism causes the ceiling to partially collapse in a 15-foot-radius area.

traits.name: Detection
traits.description: A Wisdom (Perception) check DC 15 notices cracks in the ceiling. A successful Intelligence (Investigation) DC 15 identifies the unstable supports.

actions.name: Ceiling Collapse
actions.description: Each creature in a 15-foot-radius area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage and is restrained under rubble. A restrained creature can use its action to make a DC 14 Strength check to free itself. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage and isn't restrained.
